retry_reason: Put operation must not be retried; calling it again would double-free the object (use-after-free).
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases a reference on a skb_ext structure. It calls refcount_dec_and_test and, if the last reference is being dropped, frees the object and cleans up any embedded sub-objects (XFRM security path, MCTP flows). After this function returns, the caller must not use the skb_ext pointer. There is no return value; the caller must not call __skb_ext_put again on the same pointer. The function uses an atomic read optimization when the refcount is 1, but the net effect is the same as a standard refcount_dec_and_test + free.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to decrement the reference count of a skb_ext and free it on last ref. The additional calls (XFRM/MCTP cleanup) are part of the destruction process, still refcount-centric.

check.reason: refcount_dec_and_test on ext->refcnt is a put operation; access path ext.refcnt.refs and type chain skb_ext--refcount_t--atomic_t match code.
